sources.excerpt: Restaurant-issued structured menu payload covering Breakfast, Brunch, Lunch, Dinner, and Veranda: 140 raw presentations, resolving to 130 food/nonalcoholic presentations and 107 current formulations after excluding alcohol-only rows and CMS fragments and consolidating meal-period duplicates.
notes: The captured HTML contains a parseable application/ld+json Menu payload; the corrected snapshot retains each accepted source presentation with its menu, section, exact source name, and description.
Four alcohol-only brunch beverages are excluded: Bottomless Mimosa, Bottomless Bloody Mary, The Red Snapper, and The Capitol Mary.

Six source rows are CMS/package fragments rather than standalone products: Continental Copy Copy Copy Copy, Seasonal Fruit, One Freshly Baked Breakfast Pastry, Choice of Juice Selection, Choice of entree:, and ADD ONS:.
No item-level allergen matrix, recipe corpus, cross-contact statement, shared-equipment statement, or negative allergen claim is published on the current page.
